inputs.label: Location (μ)
inputs.businessContext: Location parameter of the GEV distribution (center).

businessContext_i18n.en: Location parameter of the GEV distribution (center).

inputs.label: Scale (σ)
inputs.businessContext: Scale parameter, must be > 0. Controls spread.

businessContext_i18n.en: Scale parameter, must be > 0. Controls spread.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Ölçek parametresi, > 0 olmalıdır. Yayılımı kontrol eder.

inputs.label: Shape (ξ)
inputs.businessContext: Shape parameter. ξ>0 heavy-tailed, ξ=0 Gumbel, ξ<0 bounded.

businessContext_i18n.en: Shape parameter. ξ>0 heavy-tailed, ξ=0 Gumbel, ξ<0 bounded.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Şekil parametresi. ξ>0 ağır kuyruklu, ξ=0 Gumbel, ξ<0 sınırlı.

inputs.label: Return Period
inputs.businessContext: Average recurrence interval in years (e.g., 100 for 100-year event).

businessContext_i18n.en: Average recurrence interval in years (e.g., 100 for 100-year event).
businessContext_i18n.tr: Yıl cinsinden ortalama yinelenme aralığı (ör. 100 yıllık olay için 100).

suggestedActions: Review inputs and verify results against site standards.
